sections.paragraph:
m., collect.-

(1) reptiles, Gen 7:21 Lev 5:2 11:29 . Verse 20 , “winged reptiles (שֶׁרֶץ הָעֹוף) that walk on four” (feet), are bats (not crickets which have six legs, though they are said to use only four of them in walking), Lev 21:23 Deu 14:19.

(2) smaller aquatic animals, Gen 1:20 more fully שֶׁרֶץ הַמַּיִם Lev 11:10.
